postTitle: Do you have to have DFY service before becoming an educational community?

tags.reasoning: label=value-flex topic=coaching-philosophy flex_score=3 — Questions the need for DFY services to lead an educational community.

reply: I don't think you need a DFY offer. There are many ways to build proof besides doing the work for your clients.
